column1: Ganesha Ecosphere Ltd is a leading PET Waste Recycling company in India and is engaged in the manufacturing of Recycled Polyester Staple Fibre (RPSF), Spun yarn and dyed texturised yarn in India. [1] It was incorporated in 1987 as Ganesh Polytex Ltd and was renamed as Ganesha Ecosphere Ltd in October 2011. [2]
